Config structs load via config.Load in the Config phase and inject
anywhere: hooks, providers, handler structs. Unused config warns.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config http
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr" env:"APP_HTTP_ADDR" default:":8080"`
}

//fabrik:hook setup
func InitLogger(c *Config) error {
	_ = c.Addr
	return nil
}

//fabrik:config unused
type Unused struct {
	X string `yaml:"x"`
}
-- store/config.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

type DB struct{ kind string }

//fabrik:provider
func Open(c *Config) *DB { return &DB{kind: c.Kind} }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Config *shared.Config
	DB     *store.DB
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Config
		fabrikEnv := os.Getenv("FABRIK_ENV")
		switch fabrikEnv {
		case "development", "production":
		default:
			if fabrikEnv == "" {
				return fmt.Errorf("FABRIK_ENV is required: development or production")
			}
			return fmt.Errorf("invalid FABRIK_ENV %q: want development or production", fabrikEnv)
		}
		fabrikConfigOpts := []config.Option{
			config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
			config.File("config." + fabrikEnv + ".yaml"),
		}
		if fabrikEnv == "development" {
			fabrikConfigOpts = append(fabrikConfigOpts, config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"))
		}
		sharedConfig, err := config.Load[shared.Config](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
			config.KnownSections("http", "store", "unused"),
			config.Section("http"),
		)...)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](append(fabrikConfigOpts,
			config.KnownSections("http", "store", "unused"),
			config.Section("store"),
		)...)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}

		// Setup: after config, before providers
		if err := shared.InitLogger(sharedConfig); err != nil {
			return err
		}

		// Providers
		storeDB := store.Open(storeConfig)
		webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
			Config: sharedConfig,
			DB:     storeDB,
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
-- want/diags --
warning: shared/config.go:14:1: config struct Unused is never used
  help: inject it into a provider, hook, or handler struct, or remove the directive
